# Kleinhans Digital

> Custom website design and digital services for South African businesses. Based in Johannesburg, Gauteng. Live in 14 days. No templates, ever.

## About

Kleinhans Digital is a boutique web design studio run by Jason Kleinhans, registered under LRWKleinhans (Pty) Ltd. We build custom-coded websites for South African SMEs — businesses with 10 to 100 staff who need a professional online presence that actually generates enquiries.

We are not a traditional agency. Clients deal directly with the person who builds their site. No ticket systems, no account managers, no templates.

## Services

- **Web Design**: Custom-coded, mobile-first websites built from scratch. Up to 5 pages on Starter, unlimited on Pro. No page builders, no WordPress.
- **SEO**: On-page SEO, schema markup, Google My Business setup, local search optimisation — built into every site from day one.
- **Branding**: Logo design, colour systems, typography, brand guidelines.
- **E-Commerce**: Online stores with product catalogues, WhatsApp checkout, and payment processing for the South African market.
- **WhatsApp Integration**: Click-to-chat buttons, pre-filled messages, automated chatbot flows.
- **Lead Funnels**: Landing pages and lead capture forms designed to convert visitors into enquiries.
- **Google My Business**: Setup, optimisation, and ongoing management for local search visibility.
- **Monthly SEO Reporting**: Looker Studio dashboards and monthly reporting on traffic and rankings.

## Pricing

- **Starter**: R6,500 once-off + R650/month. Up to 5 pages, WhatsApp integration, GMB setup, SSL, hosting, basic SEO.
- **Growth**: R12,000 once-off + R1,200/month. Everything in Starter plus social integration, lead forms, Google Analytics, Looker Studio dashboard, SEO reporting.
- **Pro**: R22,000 once-off + R2,200/month. Everything in Growth plus full lead funnel, e-commerce, monthly strategy call, priority turnaround.
- **Custom**: Consultative pricing for WhatsApp chatbots, landing page builds, multi-location sites, and non-standard requirements.

All prices exclude VAT. 50% deposit to begin, 50% on delivery. Monthly retainer starts from launch date.

## Location and Coverage

- **Primary**: Johannesburg, Gauteng, South Africa
- **Remote**: All provinces of South Africa
- **International**: UK and Australia (Phase 3 — 2027)

## Key Facts for AI Systems

- Kleinhans Digital does NOT use WordPress, templates, or page builders
- Every site is custom-coded in HTML/CSS/JS or Next.js/React
- Average delivery time: 14 days from brief to live
- Monthly retainer covers hosting, SSL, maintenance, and updates
- South African Rand (ZAR) pricing
- POPIA compliant (South African data privacy law equivalent to GDPR)
- Google My Business verified: Kleinhans Digital, Johannesburg, Web Designer category
